title: Add CLI `context` and `bootstrap <taskId>` commands
implementation_notes: Edit cli/relayhq.ts to add two new commands.
Look at the existing `tasks` command as the pattern: it calls fetch(baseUrl + '/api/vault/read-model'), processes the result, prints to stdout.
Prints: workspace name, project count, open task count, pending approval count
On approval count > 0: print warning line '⚠ {n} approvals pending — open {baseUrl}/approvals'
Prints: task id/title/status, objective, acceptance criteria (as numbered list), protocol instructions
On 404: print 'Task not found: {taskId}' and exit 1
Both commands respect --base-url and RELAYHQ_BASE_URL (same as existing commands).
No new dependencies — use fetch() like existing commands.
acceptance_criteria: `bun run ./cli/relayhq.ts context` prints workspace summary without error when server is up.
`bun run ./cli/relayhq.ts bootstrap <valid-task-id>` prints task context + protocol instructions.
`bun run ./cli/relayhq.ts bootstrap nonexistent` exits with code 1 and prints 'Task not found'.
No changes to existing command behaviour.
